      1VIRUK      ) Category Riboviria      (
      1RIBVD      ) Category Orthornavirae      (

      1KITVP      ) Class Alsuviricetes      (

      TOMV00      )

seed.symptoms: Mosaic pattern of light and dark green on leaves; leaf distortion and blistering; stunted growth; fruit with internal browning.
seed.causes: Tomato mosaic virus (ToMV); transmitted mechanically via contaminated tools, hands, and infected seed; highly stable in plant debris.
seed.treatment: No cure once infected; remove and destroy infected plants; disinfect tools with 10% bleach or trisodium phosphate solution.
seed.prevention: Use certified virus-free seed; resistant varieties (Tm-2 gene); wash hands before handling plants.
